thinking.text:
The commands are getting concatenated again. I need to be more careful. Let me think about a better approach.

Looking at the extracted commands, I can see many OCR errors. However, I notice that the final frame showed the game was completed with 262 moves. The solution file should contain all the moves the player input.

Let me look at the Zork transcript more carefully. The commands seem to be:

- slay troll, g (maybe a typo for something else?)

- put all but lamp, case, temple

- put solid, ease
- ne, push all, get tool, all, set nut, wrench
- pump, boat, put all but lamp,pump

- get out, dig sand, shovel, Y (should be 'y'?), drop red
- Dopen red (open red), drop shovel, sw

- rub mirror

- ceage (cage?), drop all, get all from cage
- Dopen lid (open lid), open lid, Lid (lid?), lid, close lid, elose lid (close lid?), set switch

- get lamp,clove (get lamp,clove?)

I need to play the game mentally or look at more frames to verify. Let me check some specific frames to clarify the ambiguous commands.
